name: MISOGYNY.EXE
description: Autonomous anti-misogyny art bot. Scrapes misogynistic quotes from Reddit, generates typographic artwork with kinetic animations, mints NFTs on Base, and splits proceeds to charity (Refuge UK). Runs unattended on a Raspberry Pi every 12 hours.

erc8004_registrations.label: MISOGYNY.EXE
erc8004_registrations.purpose: Autonomous content curation, art generation, NFT minting, and charity revenue splitting

supported_tools.name: reddit_api
supported_tools.purpose: Scrape 16 subreddits + 10 search queries for misogynistic content

supported_tools.name: pinata_ipfs
supported_tools.purpose: Upload artwork PNGs and metadata JSON to IPFS

supported_tools.name: base_rpc
supported_tools.purpose: Mint ERC-721 NFTs and list on marketplace

supported_tools.name: rare_protocol_cli
supported_tools.purpose: Mint and create auctions via Rare Protocol

supported_tools.name: bluesky_atproto
supported_tools.purpose: Auto-post minted NFTs with artwork images/video

supported_tools.name: sharp
supported_tools.purpose: SVG to PNG conversion (strips script vectors)

supported_tools.name: ethers_js
supported_tools.purpose: Contract interaction, gas management, balance checks

steps: SCRAPE: Fetch posts from 16 subreddits + 10 search queries via Reddit API
CLASSIFY: Claude Haiku extracts quotes, scores them (0-100)
GUARD Layer 1: Content sanitizer — regex filters for URLs, PII, wallets, code, HTML, injection
GUARD Layer 2: AI verifier — separate Claude call confirms genuine misogyny, rejects satire/irony/incitement
FORCE ANONYMOUS: Strip all attribution, replace with 'Anonymous'
GENERATE: Create typographic SVG artwork, convert to PNG via Sharp
ANIMATE: Generate kinetic animation HTML (8 styles, weighted random)
UPLOAD: Pin artwork + metadata to IPFS via Pinata
MINT: ERC-721 on Base mainnet via Hardhat
LIST: List on marketplace with enforced royalty split
POST: Auto-post to Bluesky with artwork image
AUDIT: Self-review every N cycles, revoke low-quality mints

compute_budget.rate_limiting: Exponential backoff on Reddit 429s, max 3 retries
